creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

What I'm asking you to do is:
edit audio/lame/Makefile (or whatever editor you prefer)
Remove --enable-nasm from CONFIGURE_ARGS= and recompile LAME (you may need to recompile ffmpeg too if you're linking it with (lib)lame.

Since LAME instantly crashes I'd suggest that you just try to recompile LAME and run it first to save some time.

Best regards,
Daniel
